untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern detection requires multi-bar shape recognition and cup/handle formation identification that cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and simple comparison operators. Pattern detection requires: (1) identification of cup low point, (2) validation of cup symmetry, (3) detection of handle formation and pullback, (4) confirmation of breakout above right cup lip. These multi-bar geometric properties are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted simplified proxy: close > prev_high for breakout detection and close < sma_20 for mean reversion exit. The 34-day hold_days_max is derived from 'Formation end to breakout (handle length) 34 days' from source text. Stop loss set to 5% based on stated 9% failure rate at 5% threshold. A proper Cup with Handle detector would require pattern recognition logic outside standard indicator scope.
